versions.name: Cub Scout Adventure Camp at Camp Cris Dobbins
versions.summary: Cub Scout resident overnight camp at Camp Cris Dobbins, McNeil Scout Ranch at Peaceful Valley in Elbert, Colorado. Age-specific programming includes sports, handicrafts, nature, swimming, and boating. Each Cub attends accompanied by a parent or guardian.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
